results.title: Ambassador praises efforts of Vietnamese rescuers in Venezuela
results.description: A working delegation from the Embassy of Viet Nam in Venezuela, led by Ambassador Vu Trung My, on July 2 visited the Vietnamese search and rescue team carrying out international humanitarian duties in La Guaira state of Venezuela. Vietnamese rescuers recover 11 earthquake victims from rubble in Venezuela Second special flight delivers 46.8 tonnes of relief supplies to Venezuela Venezuela quake: Vietnamese team intensifies search efforts
